name: Buche De Noel
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until foamy, then beat in sugar.
2. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together and blend into the egg mixture. Add vanilla.
3. Grease a jelly roll pan (17 by 11 inches) with wax paper, grease paper, and sprinkle with flour.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake at 400°F (200°C) until the cake springs back when pressed with a finger, about 10-20 minutes.
5. Turn the cake out onto a tea towel sprinkled with icing sugar. Roll up the shorter side using the towel to help position the cake, then unroll and trim off any crisp edges.
6. Spread jelly or jam over the cut surface and roll up again. Let cool on a rack.
7. Ice the log with chocolate butter icing. The ends of the log can be iced with mocha icing and sprinkled as desired with icing sugar.
